task: I need a quick way to reply to a client who sent a vague note and wants a revised concept by end of day. Can you give me a couple of reply options — one very short and one a little more polished — so I can pick the cleanest one?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are two clean options.

### Very short
**Got it — can you confirm whether this is a copy tweak or a direction change?**

### Slightly more polished
**Understood — just to make sure I’m updating the right thing, is this a copy adjustment only, or do you want us revisiting the direction as well?**

If you want, I can also give you:
- a **firmer version**
- a **more casual version**
- or a **version that sounds more premium / controlled**

user_simulator.text: Yeah, clean enough. The short one works. The polished one is fine too — a little safer if I want to look more controlled. No extra fluff needed.
